untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of 'fundamental supply/demand imbalance' and 'unexpected repeated data points' from external fundamental data (not price/technical indicators). The entry condition 'Fundamental supply metric exceeds consensus for 1 period' cannot be expressed using only the allowed price-based and technical indicators. Additionally, the 'No prior uptrend in spread' condition requires external spread pricing data and trend detection not available in the standard indicator set.
translation_notes: Partial translation: Translated the spread percentile range condition (40th-60th) using price_pos_20 as a proxy for position within recent range. Exit at 80th percentile (price_pos_20 >= 0.8) is translatable. Stop loss of 2 standard deviations converted to 2.0% (reasonable approximation). Hold period set to 28 days (4 weeks). However, the core fundamental supply/demand signal cannot be operationalized without external data feeds.
